modelVersion.description: Version date for the static preview content model.

id.description: Stable content id for the milestone.

year.description: Display year or year range, e.g. "1996" or "2020-2023".

claimStatus.description: Claim status from the RITE research package's claim_status_legend. needs_confirmation material must not be published.

sourceNote.description: Optional human-readable note on where this milestone's facts came from.

lastVerified.description: ISO date this milestone's facts were last verified against source material.

productionMapping.note: Static preview content only. In the future .NET API / SQLite model, each milestone maps to a reviewed TimelineEvent entity. claimStatus, sourceNote, and lastVerified map to fields on that entity's verification record, matching the same fields on Story, Resource, and participant profiles.
